extraction.one_line_summary: HINDLEY Jay held off BERWICK Sean's sustained pressure attack on final 500m of Mount Buller, defending yellow by 10 seconds
tactical_patterns: BERWICK attacked from third wheel when gradient hit steepest ramps inside 1km, forcing leader to chase rather than pace.
Team BikeExchange positioned SMITH as buffer between YATES and breakaway, controlling without committing their GC threat early.
HINDLEY waited until final 150m inside barriers to counter rather than matching BERWICK's sustained 500m pressure attack.

rider_signals.BERWICK Sean: positive: 20-year-old attacking leader on steepest gradients suggests mature tactical awareness and climbing form progression
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: dropped quickly when BERWICK attacked despite having team support positioned ahead, weaker than GC position suggested
rider_signals.HOUSEN Damien: negative: former winner unable to follow key move when it launched, significant form deficit despite top-5 GC
rider_signals.VINE Jay: positive: finished with leaders despite no WorldTour backing, outclimbed established pros including former champion
